wikitext:
{{Event Header | StS2 Brain Leech.png}} {{E|Brain Leech|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} that can occur in the {{2|Overgrowth}}, the {{2|Underdocks}}, and the {{2|Hive}}. == Options == {{Frame|Share Knowledge}} {{TS|positive|| Choose 1 of 5 random cards to add to your deck.}}
{{Frame|Rip the Leech Off}} {{TS|negative||Lose 5 HP.}} {{TS|positive||Gain a {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} card reward.}} == Dialogue ==
*thunk* A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind. "SHARE KNOWLEDGE???" You are unsure how to proceed...
{{Frame|Share Knowledge}}
"HOW OSTENTATIOUSLY SCHOLASTIC OF A LABYRINTHINE MIND!
A VERITABLE CORNUCOPIA OF CEREBRAL SUSTENANCE TO DIGEST!" Satisfied, the creature pops off and crawls away.
You are flabbergasted.
{{Frame|Rip the Leech Off}}
You violently {{TS||shake|rip the leech off your head}} and chuck it far far away! There's a voice in your head:
{{TS|purple|up|"NOOOOOOoOoooooOOOOoooo..."}} [[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
